headline: Water Quality Reports Available Online for New Jersey American Water Customers
summary: New Jersey American Water is proud to announce that its most recent Water Quality Reports are now available for all service areas on its website at newjerseyamwater.com/waterquality. The company is proud to report that once again, the drinking water provided to the 3 million New Jerseyans it serves meets or surpasses both state and federal water quality standards for all regulated substances, including lead.

headline: American Water and Essential Utilities Proposed Merger Progresses with Approval from the Public Utilities Commission of Ohio
summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) ("American Water") and Essential Utilities, Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) ("Essential Utilities") today announced that the Public Utilities Commission of Ohio (PUCO) issued an order approving the companies' proposed merger, marking the second favorable regulatory action in less than a month toward completing the combination of the two companies.

headline: West Virginia American Water Invests Over $124 Million in Statewide System Upgrades in 2025
summary: Ahead of Infrastructure Week, West Virginia American Water announced its 2025 investments for system improvements, totaling more than $124 million in water and wastewater system upgrades throughout its service area.
